---
title: Canonical Records
description: Where challenge and dataset record pages are edited.
aliases:
  - challenge-fm-panoptic-segmentation.html
  - challenge-fm-event-completion.html
  - challenge-cross-detector-transfer.html
  - dataset-lartpc-fm-v1.html
  - dataset-multi-source-cross-detector-records.html
---

Challenge and dataset pages have one editable source each. The documentation
book should link to those records rather than copy their status, access
commands, baselines, or protocol text.

This page also catches older documentation links that used to point at
record-specific docs pages.

## Challenge Records

| Edit | Renders To |
| --- | --- |
| `challenges/<challenge-id>/challenge.qmd` | `/challenges/<challenge-id>/` |

Use the challenge record for task scope, status, detector type, metrics,
dataset links, baseline source, validation commands, citations, and math.

## Dataset Records

| Edit | Renders To |
| --- | --- |
| `datasets/<dataset-id>/dataset.qmd` | `/data-hub/<dataset-id>/` |

Use the dataset record for dataset status, access commands, schema links,
used-by relationships, citations, and dataset-specific notes.

## Shared Documentation

Use the documentation book for material that applies across records:

- challenge rules and submission conventions
- metric definitions
- physics background
- software stack notes
- contribution workflow
- dataset schema notes
